best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: successful token retrieval module: authentication source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - token is valid and not null test steps: 1. main calls gettoken() to retrieve a token. 2. main sends a request to api_manager with the valid token. 3. api_manager returns a status indicating success. expected result: - main receives a successful status from api_manager.
